barRaise.topFinding: Twentieth review, and the verdict flips to healthy for the first time. The lone HIGH that gated the last several reviews, the partial 'Yes& Chains' brand rename, is resolved: Decision 32 (DECISIONS_NEEDED.md section 32, 2026-06-15) sets 'Yes& Chains' as the formal display name, supersedes the locked BACKLOG section 1.8, and propagates the canonical layer, with the remaining 'YesAndChains' strings confirmed as correct technical identifiers. The 06-14 version-pill drift also closed: 0.51.3 is cut for real, with package.json, BUILD_VERSION, sw.js CACHE_VERSION, the index.html cache-busters, and the CONTEXT pill all agreeing and the dashboard matching. Two standing MEDIUMs remain, both AI-owned and neither blocking 1.0: the worker/src/index.js monolith (5,510 lines, a post-1.0 split) and the dashboard Get-LatestAudit, which advances the report pointer but never parses the finding counts, currently harmless only because the 06-15 audit is genuinely clean. Keep shipping; the only open work is housekeeping.
